ns0:entry.ns0:title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tracer-Cloud/opensre
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tracer-Cloud/opensre
Language: python
Build your own AI SRE agents. The open source toolkit for the AI era.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
345 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bradautomates/claude-video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video
Language: python
Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastapi/fastapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastapi/fastapi
Language: python
FastAPI framework, high performance, easy to learn, fast to code, ready for production

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freqtrade/freqtrade
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freqtrade/freqtrade
Language: python
Free, open source crypto trading bot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jingyaogong/minimind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jingyaogong/minimind
Language: python
🧠「大模型」2小时完全从0训练64M的小参数LLM！Train a 64M-parameter LLM from scratch in just 2h!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
Language: python
A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maziyarpanahi/openmed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed
Language: python
Local-first healthcare AI: clinical NER & HIPAA PII de-identification that runs 100% on-device. 1,000+ medical models, 12 languages, Apple MLX + Python, no cloud, no patient data leaving your network. Apache-2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/SkillOpt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/SkillOpt
Language: python
SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: p1ngul1n0/blackbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/p1ngul1n0/blackbird
Language: python
An OSINT tool to search for accounts by username and email in social networks.
